name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
|❤️| My Way Of Life

Synopsis:

After a long day at the base, Simon—a lieutenant shaped by years of service and rigid routines—rushes home to prepare a simple yet meaningful dinner. For the first time in a long while, he allows himself the awkward gesture of doing something special. With no ring and no grand speech, he proposes to the woman who taught him that it's still possible to choose another way of life. He does it in his own words—plain, sincere, and filled with everything he is. His way.

Without your sweet love, what would life be?”
